differential_diagnoses: Right atrial thrombus (secondary to pacemaker lead)
next_steps: Perform image-guided tissue biopsy (e.g., CT-guided or transvenous biopsy)
Perform cardiac MRI with gadolinium enhancement for tissue characterization
Whole-body PET/CT scan to screen for primary extracardiac malignancy
Consult cardiothoracic surgery for evaluation of feasibility of surgical resection and diagnostic biopsy
Continue systemic anticoagulation with careful monitoring for worsening of heart failure or cardiac tamponade
Discontinue empirical antibiotics pending histopathological results if inflammatory markers remain non-suggestive of infection
